zh.lifeSummary: 當Lambert de Lens II於大約1020年出生在法國福藍德 福藍薩時，他的父親Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne17歲，母親Mathilde Gravin van Leuven22歲。他於大約1053年與Adelaide de Normandie結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1054年登記服兵役。他去世於1054年6月19日之前在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德利勒，埋葬在比利時布拉班特 瓦隆尼維勒斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lambert de Lens II于大约1020年出生在法国福藍德 福藍薩时，他的父亲Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne17岁，母亲Mathilde Gravin van Leuven22岁。他于大约1053年与Adelaide de Normandie结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1054年登记服兵役。他去世于1054年6月19日之前在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德利勒，埋葬在比利时布拉班特 瓦隆尼維勒斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Laurens (see Lawrence ).
Galician: habitational name from a place called Lens in Ames (A Coruña).

variants.name: Lawrence
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Lorens, Laurence, from Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’, a place in Italy probably named from its laurels or bay trees. The name was borne by a Christian saint who was martyred at Rome in the 3rd century AD ; he enjoyed a considerable cult throughout Europe, with consequent popularity of the personal name (French Laurent, Italian, Spanish Lorenzo, Catalan Llorenç, Portuguese Lourenço, German Laurenz, Polish Wawrzyniec, etc.). In Britain this is a common name from the 12th century, with pet forms such as Law , Low , Lawrie , Laurie , Larry , Larkin , all of which are represented in surnames. There was also a feminine form Laurencia which may have given rise to the English surname. The surname is also borne by Jews among whom it is presumably an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Ashkenazic surnames. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. German Lorenz , and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Slovenian Lavrenčič and Lovrenčič (patronymics from Lavrencij and Lovrenc, equivalents of Lawrence), Polish Wawrzyniak . Compare Larrance , Laurence , Lawerence , Lieurance , and Lowrance .

nameMeanings.name: Lambert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is from an Old French given name of Germanic origin, from land ‘land, territory’ + beorht ‘famous’. This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

variants.name: Lammert
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is from an Old French given name of Germanic origin, from land ‘land, territory’ + beorht ‘famous’. This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

en.lifeSummary: When Lambert de Lens II was born about 1020, in French Flanders, France, his father, Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne, was 17 and his mother, Mathilde Gravin van Leuven, was 22. He married Adelaide de Normandie about 1053. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1054. He died before 19 June 1054, in Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, and was buried in Nivelles, Walloon Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lambert de Lens II est né environ 1020, à Flandre française, France, son père, Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Mathilde Gravin van Leuven, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Adelaide de Normandie environ 1053. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1054. Il est décédé avant 19 juin 1054, à Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, et a été enterré à Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lambert de Lens II um 1020 in Flandre française, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne 17 und seine Mutter Mathilde Gravin van Leuven 22. Er hat um 1053 Adelaide de Normandie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1054 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb vor 19. Juni 1054 in Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Nivelles, Wallonisch Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lambert de Lens II è nato il circa 1020 nel Flandre française, Francia, il suo padre, Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde Gravin van Leuven, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Adelaide de Normandie circa 1053. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1054. Morì prima del 19 giugno 1054, nel Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, e fu sepolto a Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Lambert de Lens IIが約1020年にフランスフランダー フランcアイゼで生まれた時，父Eustache Ier comte de Boulogneは17歳，母Mathilde Gravin van Leuvenは22歳であった。約1053年にAdelaide de Normandieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1054年に兵役登録をした。彼は1054年6月19日以前にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードリルで死去し，ベルギーブラバント ワロンニベレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lambert de Lens II(이)가 대략 1020년 프랑스 플랜드르 프랜c아이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde Gravin van Leuven(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1053년 Adelaide de Normandie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1054년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1054년 6월 19일 이전 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 릴에서 사망했으며 벨기에 브라반트 월런 니벨레스에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1020–before 19 June 1054: ойролцоогоор 1020 он–1054 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 19–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lambert de Lens II nasceu aproximadamente 1020, em Flandre française, França, seu pai, Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde Gravin van Leuven, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelaide de Normandie aproximadamente 1053. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1054. Ele faleceu antes 19 de junho de 1054, em Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, e foi sepultado em Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lambert de Lens II родился около 1020 г. в местности фландр франcеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde Gravin van Leuven, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelaide de Normandie около 1053 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. В 1054 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер перед 19 июнь 1054 г. в местности лилл, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция и был похоронен в местности нивеллесь, брабант валлон, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lambert de Lens II nació aproximadamente 1020, en Flandre française, Francia, su papá, Eustache Ier comte de Boulogne, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Mathilde Gravin van Leuven, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Adelaide de Normandie aproximadamente 1053. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1054. Murió antes de 19 de junio de 1054, en Lille, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, y fue sepultado en Nivelles, Brabant wallon, Bélgica.
